name: rdna_X_NOR_bobbed
description: X-chromosome ribosomal DNA NOR at the bobbed (bb) locus, X pericentric heterochromatin. Contains ~200-250 tandem copies of the 11.5 kb 45S rDNA unit (18S-5.8S-2S-28S genes + IGS). Half the rDNA is on chrX, half on chrY. Reduction below ~50 copies causes the bobbed phenotype (short bristles, slow development). R1/R2 non-LTR retrotransposons insert specifically into the 28S gene.
expected_copy_count: ~200-250 tandem 11.5 kb 45S rDNA units (variable, bobbed mutants <50)
